title: Variable Declaration
description: Demonstrate how to declare variables in PHP using the $ symbol.
problemStatement:
Variables in PHP always start with `$`. Declare two variables: `$appName` with the value `"Progly"` and `$version` with the value `1.0`. Print them separated by a space.

**Requirement:** Use correct PHP naming conventions.
hints: Include the `$` before every variable name, even when assigning.
